title: Aanish Pradhan
text:
Hi there and welcome to my personal website!

About Me
Currently, I’m a graduate student at Virginia Tech working towards my master’s degree in computer science. I completed my bachelor’s in Computational Modeling and Data Analytics (bulky phrase for applied math, computer science and statistics, I know…) from Virginia Tech.
Broadly, my research interests lie at the intersection of numerical linear algebra, high-performance computing and machine learning. I also have interests in data visualization, explainable artificial intelligence and pedagogy.


Contact
The best way to contact me is by sending me a message on my LinkedIn.

title: Skills
text:
Mentorship, Public speaking, Scientific writing, Teaching, Team leadership



Areas: Data Visualization, Deep Learning, Digital Signal Processing, Environmental Data Science, GPU Programming, Machine (Statistical) Learning, Mathematical Modeling, Numerical Linear Algebra, Parallel Programming
Languages: Bash, C, Java, JavaScript, Julia, GNU Octave/MATLAB, Python, R, SQL
Libraries: CUDA, Matplotlib, NumPy, OpenCL, OpenMP, (Open) MPI, pandas, PyTorch, ROCm HIP, scikit-learn, SciPy, Seaborn, tidyverse (dplyr, forcats, ggplot2, lubridate, readr, stringr)
Tools: CSS, Git, GitHub/GitLab, HTML, (R)Markdown, RStudio, Vim, Visual Studio Code
